column3: 0 Backspaces used on the command.

column3: 5 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).

column3: 8 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).

column3: 15 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).

column3: 25 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).

column3: 1 backspace allowed per target without breaking streak.

column3: 1-2 Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat 10% penalty of current Base Hit. Minor slip.

column3: 3-4 Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat 20% penalty of current Base Hit. Sloppy typing.

column4: Flat -30 points. Separated from Static Jam for granularity.

column3: 7+ Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat -50 points. Max typing penalty. Capped to prevent death spirals.

column3: Tracks consecutive bases destroyed WITHOUT an asteroid kill in between.
column4: A counter tracks how many bases have been destroyed in a row. Destroying an asteroid resets the counter to 0. Penalty only applies on the 2nd+ consecutive base destroyed.
column6: Counter resets on any asteroid destroyed

column3: First base destroyed in a consecutive streak.
column4: No penalty. Player gets a free pass on the first base lost.

column3: Second base destroyed without destroying an asteroid in between.
column4: -100 point penalty. Pressure mounts.

column3: Third base destroyed without destroying an asteroid in between.
column4: -200 point penalty. Escalating consequence.

column3: Fourth or more base destroyed without destroying an asteroid in between.
column4: -300 point penalty per additional base. Capped at -300 to prevent total wipeout spirals.

column3: Player destroys any asteroid.
column4: Resets the consecutive base destruction counter to 0. Next base destroyed will be treated as the 1st (no penalty).

column3: penalty = MAX(0, (consecutive_count - 1)) * -100
column4: Capped at -300 per event. E.g.: count=1 ? 0, count=2 ? -100, count=3 ? -200, count=4+ ? -300.

column3: Old per-base Rank Penalty from progression.csv.

column3: Target destroyed in the bottom 10% of the screen (just before impact).

column2: Perfect Shot + Early Intercept + Speed Demon can all stack on one kill. Apply additively to Base Hit (e.g., 0.25 + 0.5 + 0.15 = 0.9x bonus).
Counts consecutive asteroid kills without a base being destroyed. Breaking streak (base destroyed) resets kill-streak counter to 0.
1 backspace per target is allowed without breaking a Perfect Shot streak. 2+ backspaces on any single target breaks the streak.
Separate counter from kill-streak. Tracks consecutive bases destroyed. Resets to 0 whenever ANY asteroid is destroyed. Penalty = MIN(-300, (count - 1) * -100).
No single event can deduct more than -300 points. Prevents death spirals at high difficulty.
Player score cannot go below 0. If penalty would reduce score below 0, score is set to 0.
